allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const icons = ['House','Buildings','Users','FileText','CurrencyDollar','Wrench','ChartBar','Gear','Bell','MagnifyingGlass','CaretRight','List','X','SquaresFour','Money','ArrowRight','Circle','CheckCircle','Warning','Info']; icons.forEach\(i => console.log\(i, !!p[i]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@phosphor-icons/react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(p\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('_'\)\).slice\(0, 50\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if any\(x in k for x in ['tailwind','postcss','tw-','shadcn','css']\)]")
